name: Chicken and Roasted Pepper Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless skinless chicken breast halves (1/2 pound each)
1 jar roasted red bell peppers, drained (7.25 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to broil.
2. Trim excess fat from chicken.
3. Place chicken on the rack in the broiler pan.
4. Broil with tops 4-6 inches from heat for 15-20 minutes, turning once until juice is no longer pink at the center of the thickest pieces.
5. Cut into 1/4-inch strips; set aside.
6. Add peppers and onion to a blender or food processor; cover and blend on medium speed until smooth.
7. Heat pepper mixture, broth, lime juice, cilantro, salt, pepper, and garlic in a 2-quart saucepan over high heat until boiling.
8. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
9. Stir in chicken and jicama; heat until hot.
